description: Heavy typos in day names, locations, and event terms throughout. Marketing campaign meeting on Wednesday at 11 AM in the board room.

events.title: Marketing Campaign Meeting
events.reasoning: Despite pervasive typos, Alice and Bob agree to a marketing campaign discussion on Wednesday ('wendsay'/'wensday') at 11 AM in the board room ('bord rom'). Dave is also invited.
events.assumptions: Duration assumed 1 hour per Alice's 'about an hour or so'. 'Wendsay' = Wednesday = 2026-02-25.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 1 event: marketing campaign meeting on Wednesday at 11 AM in the board room with Alice, Bob, and Dave.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. 'Wendsay'/'wensday' = Wednesday = 2026-02-25. Multiple typos: schedul, meating, discus, campain, confrence/confernce, therd, bord rom, perfact, shuld, evreything, defintley, budegt.
